CustomField.description: When checked, this option prevents the generation of journal entries for transactions associated with leases linked to this accounting profile. Selecting this option will ensure that no journal entries are created for transactions on leases that use this accounting profile.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: When checked, this option prevents the generation of journal entries for transactions associated with leases linked to this accounting profile. Selecting this option will ensure that no journal entries are created for transactions on leases that use this accounting profile.
CustomField.label: Disable Journal Generation
